title: BEM-695 hourly snapshot
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-19 | 10:05 (UTC+3)'
wf=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
renderer=Path('scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py')
blocker=None
changed=[]
if not wf.exists():
    blocker={'code':'CURATOR_HOURLY_WORKFLOW_MISSING','path':str(wf)}
else:
    text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    snapshot='governance/state/curator_hourly_report_last_snapshot.json'
    if snapshot not in text:
        text=text.replace('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json', 'governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json '+snapshot)
        wf.write_text(text)
        changed.append(str(wf))
# Add explicit runtime proof note in renderer comments without changing logic.
if renderer.exists():
    r=renderer.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'BEM-695 snapshot must be committed' not in r:
        r=r.replace('SNAPSHOT = Path("governance/state/curator_hourly_report_last_snapshot.json")', 'SNAPSHOT = Path("governance/state/curator_hourly_report_last_snapshot.json")  # BEM-695 snapshot must be committed by workflow')
        renderer.write_text(r)
        changed.append(str(renderer))
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
checks=[
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'renderer_exists','pass':renderer.exists(),'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'snapshot_file_is_committed','pass':'curator_hourly_report_last_snapshot.json' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'delta_message_exists','pass':renderer.exists() and 'Изменений за отчётный час нет' in renderer.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'generated_at_and_period_exist','pass':renderer.exists() and 'Сформировано:' in renderer.read_text(errors='ignore') and 'Период:' in renderer.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(renderer)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed and blocker is None else 'failed'
if status!='pass' and blocker is None:
    blocker={'code':'HOURLY_SNAPSHOT_COMMIT_FIX_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'fix_hourly_snapshot_commit.v1','bem':'BEM-695','status':status,'checks':checks,'changed':changed,'root_cause':'snapshot file was not guaranteed to be committed by curator-hourly-report workflow; without committed snapshot every run renders full table','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem695_fix_hourly_snapshot_commit.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem695_fix_hourly_snapshot_commit.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-695 | Fix Hourly Snapshot Commit | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Root cause: snapshot сравнения не был гарантированно добавлен в commit workflow. Без сохранённого snapshot следующий hourly запуск снова отправлял полную таблицу.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem695_fix_hourly_snapshot_commit','status':status,'root_cause':'snapshot_not_committed_between_hourly_runs','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem695_fix_hourly_snapshot_commit.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-695 '+status.upper()+': hourly snapshot commit fixed.\n')
changed_files.extend(changed+[str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Fixed hourly delta persistence by ensuring curator_hourly_report_last_snapshot.json is committed by curator-hourly-report workflow')
"""
No issue comments.
